categories.name: Standalone Projects
categories.description: Independent tools and frameworks I've built.

categories.name: pi Extensions
categories.description: My collection of extensions for the pi coding agent.

descriptionMap.openmux: A simpler multiplexer, built with OpenTUI. Terminal window management reimagined.
descriptionMap.pi-neuralwatt-provider: Neuralwatt as a custom model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-fireworks-provider: Fireworks AI as a model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-crofai-provider: Enable crof.ai as a model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-opencode-provider: OpenCode as a model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-opencode-go-provider: OpenCode (Go) as a model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-wafer-provider: wafer.ai as a custom model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-moonshot-provider: Moonshot as a custom model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-deepseek-provider: DeepSeek as a custom model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-baseten-provider: Baseten as a custom model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-routing-run-provider: Routing.run as a custom model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-io-provider: IO Intelligence as a custom model provider for pi.
descriptionMap.pi-parasail-provider: Access DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM, Kimi, Llama, Gemma, Mistral and more through the Parasail API.
descriptionMap.pi-lilac-provider: Access Kimi K2.6, GLM 5.1, and Gemma 4 models through Lilac's OpenAI-compatible API on idle GPUs.
descriptionMap.pi-loop: Creates and closes a verification loop on a task.
descriptionMap.pi-retry: Simple retry extension for 400 and 413 errors.
descriptionMap.pi-lazy-extensions: Lazy-load pi extensions on demand via a ToolSearch-style proxy tool.
descriptionMap.pi-warp-kitty-images: Enable Kitty image protocol for Warp terminal in pi's TUI.
descriptionMap.pi-computer-use-harness: Control your applications using pi-coding-agent. Fully invisible harness architecture.
descriptionMap.pi-reason-harness: Recursive self-improving reasoning harness for pi: iterate, verify, improve.
descriptionMap.pi-autoresearch: Autonomous experiment loop extension with worktrees. Optimize code through automated benchmarking.
descriptionMap.pi-recurse: Recursive subagent delegation, inspired by RLMs. Delegate work in single, parallel, or chain modes.
descriptionMap.pi-var: Copy-on-Write (CoW) development workspaces. Isolated variations for parallel experiments.
descriptionMap.pi-tps: See your LLM generation speed (tokens/second) after every agent turn.
descriptionMap.pi-tps-web: A web interface to capture pi session customType exports from pi-tps.
descriptionMap.vscode-aql: Syntax Highlighting for ArangoDB Query Language (AQL). Available on the VSCode Marketplace.
descriptionMap.inline-yaml: JavaScript/TypeScript YAML Template Literal Syntax Highlighting. Write YAML inside your JS with full editor support.
descriptionMap.flame-js: FLAME-style remote execution for TypeScript with Bun, Effect.ts internals. Distributed computing made simple.
descriptionMap.nested-modal-transducers-golang-implemen: Nested Modal Transducers in Go, spiced up with XState patterns. State machines meet Go.
descriptionMap.cowl: Copy-on-Write cloning for macOS. Fast, efficient filesystem operations.
descriptionMap.grpc-reverse-proxy: A lightweight reverse proxy for gRPC services.
descriptionMap.tab-flow-chrome: Chrome extension for managing tabs with workflow automation, dark theme support, and smart organization features.
descriptionMap.mastra-observer-mailbox: Ambient/background agent library for Mastra. Give your AI agents a persistent memory layer.
descriptionMap.elevenlabs-docs-mcp: MCP server for ElevenLabs documentation. Bridge the gap between your AI coding assistant and voice AI docs.
descriptionMap.trie_hard_zig: Novel Trie data structure optimized for small, sparse maps, rewritten in Zig.
descriptionMap.sorted_set_nif_zig: Elixir SortedSet backed by a Zig-based NIF for performance.
descriptionMap.gitea_on_fly: Self-hosted Gitea on Fly.io. Git hosting that scales.
descriptionMap.docker-wscat: Lightweight wscat Docker image based on node:alpine. WebSocket testing in a container.
descriptionMap.dotfiles_i3: My i3 window manager configuration. Tiling window management done right.
